step_results.name: Initialize smoke workspace
step_results.evidence: reports/post_deploy_smoke/ created; git sha eb90e67 recorded

step_results.name: DNS + TLS + HTTPS
step_results.evidence: TMA: HTTP/1.1 200 OK, Server: cloudflare; API: HTTP/1.1 200 OK, Server: cloudflare
step_results.notes: Both URLs reachable over HTTPS with valid TLS

step_results.name: Pages build sanity
step_results.notes: VITE_API_URL fix applied to deploy.yml — requires WORKER_URL secret

step_results.name: Telegram initData auth
step_results.notes: Positive test (valid initData) deferred to manual Telegram testing

step_results.name: Bot webhook + commands
step_results.notes: Requires operator to test /start, /new_sop, /my_sops from Telegram client

step_results.name: Create SOP via interview
step_results.notes: Requires real Telegram bot interaction; see SMOKE_SUMMARY.md for manual steps

step_results.name: Approval gating
step_results.notes: Requires authenticated user and test workspace; see SMOKE_SUMMARY.md

step_results.name: RBAC isolation
step_results.evidence: All 16 endpoint tests return 401 for missing/fake auth; 80 security tests pass
step_results.notes: Templates GET intentionally public (read-only catalog); no RBAC leak detected

step_results.name: Rate limiting
step_results.evidence: D1 rate limiter deployed in middleware; 7 security tests validate behavior
step_results.notes: Cannot trigger live rate limit without authenticated user

step_results.name: Audit log integrity
step_results.evidence: Integration tests confirm audit writes with entity IDs and actors
step_results.notes: Live verification deferred to manual Telegram testing (steps 5-7)

step_results.name: Payment webhook idempotency
step_results.notes: PAYMENTS_AUTOMATED=false; D1 unique constraint on provider+external_id

step_results.name: R2 storage
step_results.evidence: SERVER_PDF_EXPORT=false; bucket sop-builder-exports exists and is bound
step_results.notes: Feature disabled; will test when enabled

step_results.name: Cron jobs
step_results.notes: Cron reminders not configured in this deployment

step_results.name: Observability
step_results.evidence: Structured JSON logging verified in integration tests; error responses contain code+message only
step_results.notes: No secrets leaked in error responses

step_results.name: Rollback readiness
step_results.evidence: Rollback steps documented in SMOKE_SUMMARY.md; previous deployments available via wrangler deployments list
step_results.notes: Worker, Pages, Queue Consumer all support rollback

action_items: Re-deploy TMA after setting WORKER_URL (so VITE_API_URL is baked in)
Operator: set webhook via deploy workflow or manually via Telegram Bot API
